plans.name: Starter
plans.ideal_for: Freelancers and small teams getting started
plans.limitations: No SSO, no webhooks, no SLA

plans.name: Growth
plans.ideal_for: Growing teams that need automation and integrations
plans.limitations: No SSO, no audit logs, no SLA

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.ideal_for: Large organizations needing compliance, security, and scale

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes, plan changes take effect immediately and are prorated.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes, all plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards, ACH bank transfers, and invoicing for Enterprise clients.

faq.question: Do you offer discounts for non-profits or education?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 30% off for verified non-profits and educational institutions.
